recommendations.title: Dororo
recommendations.overview: Hyakkimaru, a warrior on a quest to reclaim 48 of his body parts which were each taken by a demon, is joined by Dororo, a thief on a quest to avenge the death of her parents.

recommendations.title: Dragonheart: Vengeance
recommendations.overview: Lukas, a young farmer whose family is killed by savage raiders in the countryside, sets out on an epic quest for revenge, forming an unlikely trio with a majestic dragon and a swashbuckling, sword-fighting mercenary, Darius.

recommendations.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
recommendations.overview: Bilbo Baggins, a hobbit enjoying his quiet life, is swept into an epic quest by Gandalf the Grey and thirteen dwarves who seek to reclaim their mountain home from Smaug, the dragon.

recommendations.title: Wish Dragon
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Determined teen Din is longing to reconnect with his childhood best friend when he meets a wish-granting dragon who shows him the magic of possibilities.

recommendations.title: Legend of the BoneKnapper Dragon
recommendations.overview: Hiccup and friends accompany their mentor, Gobber, on a quest to kill the legendary Boneknapper Dragon.

recommendations.title: Monsters 103 Mercies Dragon Damnation
recommendations.overview: A samurai's path leads him to a young waitress whose hometown was destroyed by a dragon. He doesn't want any trouble — but it finds them anyway.

recommendations.title: How to Train Your Dragon
recommendations.overview: As the son of a Viking leader on the cusp of manhood, shy Hiccup Horrendous Haddock III faces a rite of passage: he must kill a dragon to prove his warrior mettle. But after downing a feared dragon, he realizes that he no longer wants to destroy it,

recommendations.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge on the Run
recommendations.overview: When his best friend Gary is suddenly snatched away, SpongeBob takes Patrick on a madcap mission far beyond Bikini Bottom to save their pink-shelled pal.

recommendations.title: White Snake
recommendations.overview: One day a young woman named Blanca is saved by Xuan, a snake catcher from a nearby village. As they set off an a journey to discover her real identity, the pair develop feelings for each other.

recommendations.title: Dragon Rider
recommendations.overview: An unlikely trio of heroes – a dragon, a boy and a forest brownie – embark on an epic adventure to find the “Rim of Heaven” - the mythological safe haven for all dragons.
